mapper.select: SELECT P.productName, P.productSeq, P.imageURL, P.price, P.price*(1 - (IFNULL(D.discountRate, 0)*0.01)) AS reducedPrice, CONCAT(ROUND(D.discountRate), '%') AS discountRate, M.materialName, PS.sizeName, C.orderMemo, C.quantity, C.cartSeq FROM userCart C JOIN user U ON C.userSeq = U.userSeq JOIN product P ON C.productSeq = P.productSeq JOIN material M ON C.materialSeq = M.materialSeq LEFT JOIN productSize PS ON C.productSizeSeq = PS.productSizeSeq LEFT JOIN discount D ON P.discountSeq = D.discountSeq WHERE U.userId = #{userId}

SELECT SUM(P.price*C.quantity) AS totalPrice, SUM(P.price*C.quantity*(IFNULL(D.discountRate, 0)*0.01)) AS totalDiscountPrice, SUM(P.price*C.quantity*(1 - (IFNULL(D.discountRate, 0)*0.01))) AS totalCost, SUM(C.quantity) AS totalQuantity FROM userCart C JOIN user U ON C.userSeq = U.userSeq JOIN product P ON C.productSeq = P.productSeq LEFT JOIN discount D ON P.discountSeq = D.discountSeq WHERE U.userId = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE userCart c JOIN stock s ON c.productSeq = s.productSeq SET c.quantity = c.quantity + 1, c.updatedAt = NOW() WHERE c.cartSeq = #{cartSeq} AND c.productSeq = #{productSeq} AND c.quantity < s.quantity
